tags.documentation: Value of duration in milliseconds.
tags.name: Duration

tags.documentation: Length of the arm.
tags.name: Length

tags.documentation: Delay in milliseconds before animation comes to a stop.
tags.name: StopDelay

tags.documentation: Width of the arm.
tags.name: Width

eventScripts.script:
tags = system.tag.readBlocking([
		 "[.]../Outputs/Command"
		,"[.]StopDelay"
		,"[.]Duration"
		,"[.]Angle"
		,"[.]../Outputs/Offset"
		,"[.]../Outputs/Origin"
	])
	command   = tags[0]
	stopDelay = tags[1].value
	duration  = tags[2].value
	angle     = tags[3].value
	offset    = tags[4].value
	origin    = tags[5].value
		
	if currentValue.value == False:
		lastAction = max(command.timestamp, previousValue.timestamp)
		
		offset = offset + stopDelay + system.date.millisBetween(lastAction, currentValue.timestamp)
		if offset>=duration:
			offset = duration
			pauseAngle = angle
		else:
			pauseAngle = origin + 1.0*offset/duration*(angle-origin)
		
		newCommand = {
			'finishBy': system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp) + stopDelay
			,'transform':'rotate(%sdeg)'%pauseAngle
			,'angle': pauseAngle
			,'duration': stopDelay
			,'timestamp' : system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp)
		}
	else:
		newCommand = {
			'finishBy': system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp) + duration - offset
			,'transform':'rotate(%sdeg)'%angle
			,'angle': angle
			,'duration': duration - offset
			,'timestamp' : system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp)
		}
		
	tagPaths = ["[.]../Outputs/Command","[.]../Outputs/Offset"]
	values = [system.util.jsonEncode(newCommand),offset]
	system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)

tags.documentation: Determines if animation should be running or not, see script.
tags.name: Enable

eventScripts.script:
tags = system.tag.readBlocking([
		 "[.]../Outputs/Command"
		,"[.]Duration"
	])
	command  = tags[0]
	duration = tags[1].value
	
	newCommand = {
		'finishBy': system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp) + duration
		,'transform':'rotate(%sdeg)'%currentValue.value
		,'angle': currentValue.value
		,'duration': duration
		,'timestamp' : system.date.toMillis(currentValue.timestamp)
	}
	
	tagPaths = ["[.]../Outputs/Origin","[.]../Outputs/Command","[.]../Outputs/Offset","[.]Enable"]
	values = [command.value.angle,system.util.jsonEncode(newCommand),0,1]
	system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)

tags.documentation: Value of current angle, see script.
tags.name: Angle

tags.documentation: Value is generated by Angle and Enable tag scripts. By having command be one document tag many race conditions are eliminated where angle but not duration are not updated at exact same time.
tags.name: Command

tags.documentation: Updated by Enable tag to store progress if paused.
tags.name: Offset

tags.documentation: Previous value of Angle, used to calculate where to pause.
tags.name: Origin

tags.documentation: Determines if animation finished.
tags.name: Complete

tags.documentation: Control values, Hand-2 / Off-0 / Auto-1
tags.name: HOA

tags.documentation: Safety input, stop motion if used as an interlock.
tags.name: SafetyOK

tags.documentation: On when HOA is not off.
tags.name: Running

tags.documentation: Dataset of all steps in this state machine.
tags.name: Steps

tags.documentation: Path of this UDT, used for dynamic tag paths.
tags.name: UDTpath

eventScripts.script:
# one long script to prevent race conditions
	
	import traceback
	
	# read all dataset tags
	rwPaths = [
		 "[.]Interlocks"
 		,"[.]InterlocksOK"
 		,"[.]TagWrites"
 		,"[.]TagWritesOK"
 		,"[.]Permissives"
 		,"[.]PermissivesOK"
 		,"[.]Status"
 		,"[.]Step"
 		,"[.]LastStep"
	]
	roPaths = [
		 "[.]TimerComplete"
 		,"[.]PassStep"
 		,"[.]FailStep"
 		,"[.]../Controls/HOA"
 		,"[.]../UDTpath"
	]
	tags = system.tag.readBlocking(rwPaths+roPaths)
	interlocks    = tags[0].value
	interlocksOK  = tags[1].value
	tagWrites     = tags[2].value
	tagWritesOK   = tags[3].value
	permissives   = tags[4].value
	permissivesOK = tags[5].value
	status_		  = tags[6].value
	step 		  = tags[7].value
	lastStep      = tags[8].value
	
	timerComplete = tags[len(rwPaths)+0].value
	passStep 	  = tags[len(rwPaths)+1].value
	failStep 	  = tags[len(rwPaths)+2].value
	HOA 	      = tags[len(rwPaths)+3].value
	udtPath	      = tags[len(rwPaths)+4].value
	
	# if step has changed load new step
	status = {}
	stepChangePaths = []
	stepChangeValues = []
	if lastStep != step:
		lastStep = step
		system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]Status","[.]LastStep"], [{'Running':'Changing to step %s' % step}, lastStep])
	
		atomics = ["Name","DurationMS","PassStep","FailStep"]
		headers = ["originalPath","tagPath","tagValue","currentValue"]
		
		steps = system.tag.readBlocking("[.]../Steps")[0].value
		stepFound = False
		
		for i in range(steps.getRowCount()):
			if step == steps.getValueAt(i,'Step'):
				stepFound = True
				try:
					passStep = steps.getValueAt(i,'PassStep')
					failStep = steps.getValueAt(i,'FailStep')
					for atomic in atomics:
						stepChangePaths.append('[.]%s'%atomic)
						stepChangeValues.append(steps.getValueAt(i,atomic))
						
					def decodePath(fullTagPath, dynamicPath):
						foldersBack = dynamicPath.count('[.]') + dynamicPath.count('../')
						if foldersBack > 0:
							return '%s/%s'%(fullTagPath.rsplit('/',foldersBack)[0] ,dynamicPath.replace('[.]','').replace('../',''))
						else:
							return dynamicPath
							
					def columnToDataset(column):
						data = []
						json = system.util.jsonDecode(steps.getValueAt(i,column))
						if json:
							for element in json:
								data.append([
									 str(element['tagPath'])
									,decodePath(udtPath,str(element['tagPath']))
									,str(element['tagValue'])
									,''
								])
						return system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, data)
						
					interlocks    = columnToDataset('Interlocks')
					interlocksOK  = False
					tagWrites     = columnToDataset('TagWrites')
					tagWritesOK   = False
					permissives   = columnToDataset('Permissives')
					permissivesOK = False
					timerComplete = False
				
					stepChangePaths.append("[.]TimerTimestamp")
#					stepChangeValues.append(currentValue.timestamp)
					stepChangeValues.append(system.date.now())
					
					stepChangePaths.append("[.]TimerOffset")
					stepChangeValues.append(0)
					
					status = {'Running':'Changed to step %s'%step}
					break
				except:
					system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]Status"], [{'Faulted':'Failed settings step %s, error: %s'%(step, traceback.format_exc())}])
					return
			else:
				continue
				
		if not stepFound:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]Status"], [{'Faulted':'Step %s does not exist!'%step}])
			return
	
	# compile a list of all tags to read, interlocks + permissives
	tagPaths=[]
	for i in range(interlocks.getRowCount()):
		tagPaths.append(interlocks.getValueAt(i,'tagPath'))
	for i in range(permissives.getRowCount()):
		tagPaths.append(permissives.getValueAt(i,'tagPath'))
	tagPaths = list(set(tagPaths)) # removes duplicates
	tagDict = {}
	if tagPaths:
		tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)
		for i, tagPath_ in enumerate(tagPaths):
			tagDict.update({tagPath_:tagValues[i].value})
	
	# common function used by interlocks and permissives
	def checkTags(dataset):
		allOK = True
		for i in range(dataset.getRowCount()):
			currValue = tagDict[dataset.getValueAt(i,'tagPath')]
			dataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, i,'currentValue',currValue)
			if str(currValue).upper() != str(dataset.getValueAt(i,'tagValue')).upper():
				allOK = False
		return dataset, allOK
			
	# check interlocks, pause if not ok
	interlocks, interlocksOK = checkTags(interlocks)
	
	# execute tag writes once
	writePaths = []
	writeValues = []
	if not tagWritesOK and interlocksOK and HOA != 0:
		for i in range(tagWrites.getRowCount()):
			writePaths.append(tagWrites.getValueAt(i,'tagPath'))
			writeValues.append(tagWrites.getValueAt(i,'tagValue'))
		tagWritesOK = True
		status = {'Running':'Executed tag writes for step %s'%step}
	
	# check permissives, PassStep if ok, FailStep if not ok
	permissives, permissivesOK = checkTags(permissives)
	
	if not interlocksOK:
		status = {'Idle':'Waiting for interlocks, step %s'%step}
	elif not tagWritesOK:
		status = {'Idle':'Waiting for tag writes, step %s'%step}
	else:
		if timerComplete:
			if permissivesOK:
				if HOA == 1: step = passStep
			else:
				if failStep > 0:
					status = {'Faulted':'Waiting for permissives, step %s'%step}
					if HOA == 1: step = failStep
				else:
					status = {'Idle':'Waiting for permissives, step %s'%step}
					
	if status != {}:
		newStatus = system.util.jsonEncode(status)
	else:
		newStatus = status_
			
	rwValues = [	
		 interlocks   
		,interlocksOK 
		,tagWrites    
		,tagWritesOK  
		,permissives  
		,permissivesOK
		,newStatus
		,step
		,lastStep
	]
	
	system.tag.writeBlocking(rwPaths+stepChangePaths+writePaths, rwValues+stepChangeValues+writeValues)

tags.documentation: Main script where logic occurs.
tags.name: Script

tags.documentation: Name of the current step.
tags.name: Name

tags.documentation: Step to which state machine will proceed if permissives are not met by the time the step timer finishes. If 0 the state machine will remain on the current step.
tags.name: FailStep

tags.documentation: Status of the current step.
tags.name: Status

tags.documentation: Dataset of interlock tags that must be true for a state machine to run.
tags.name: Interlocks

tags.documentation: Duration of the step.
tags.name: DurationMS

tags.documentation: Boolean for when the timer has finished.
tags.name: TimerComplete

tags.documentation: All permissives are satisfied or empty.
tags.name: PermissivesOK

tags.documentation: Dataset of tag paths that will be executed during this step.
tags.name: TagWrites

tags.documentation: Tag writes were completed successfully.
tags.name: TagWritesOK

tags.documentation: Previous step of the state machine, used to determine when a new step is started.
tags.name: LastStep

tags.documentation: How long has a specific step been running, paused with interlocks are not ok.
tags.name: Timer

tags.documentation: Current step.
tags.name: Step

eventScripts.script:
if currentValue.value == False:
		tagPaths = ["[.]TimerOffset","[.]Step"]
		tags = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)
		offset = tags[0].value
		step = tags[1]
		timestamp = max(step.timestamp, previousValue.timestamp)
		
		tagPaths = ["[.]TimerOffset","[.]TimerTimestamp"]
		values = [offset + system.date.millisBetween(timestamp, system.date.now()), currentValue.timestamp]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)
	else:
		tagPaths = ["[.]TimerTimestamp"]
		values = [currentValue.timestamp]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)

tags.documentation: All interlocks are satisfied or empty.
tags.name: InterlocksOK

tags.documentation: Timer offset used for pausing and resuming a step.
tags.name: TimerOffset

tags.documentation: Tag used by Timer as the starting timestamp. It is written by Script and InterlocksOK tag change scripts.
tags.name: TimerTimestamp

tags.documentation: Dataset of permissive tags that must be true for a state machine to proceed to PassStep.
tags.name: Permissives

tags.documentation: Step to which state machine will proceed if permissives are met by the time the step timer finishes.
tags.name: PassStep

tags.documentation: Joint UDT.
tags.name: Arm3

tags.documentation: Boolean to display part or not.
tags.name: Part

tags.documentation: Width of the part.
tags.name: PartWidth

tags.documentation: X location for the XY move.
tags.name: X

tags.documentation: Used to re-trigger /Output/Command when X,Y,Theta have not changed.
tags.name: ExecuteXY

tags.documentation: Angle of the part during XY move.
tags.name: Theta

tags.documentation: Y location for XY move.
tags.name: Y

tags.documentation: Length of the part.
tags.name: PartLength

tags.documentation: Joint UDT.
tags.name: Arm2

tags.documentation: Joint UDT.
tags.name: Arm1

tags.documentation: StateMachine UDT.
tags.name: StateMachine

tags.documentation: Current X location of the part center.
tags.name: PartCenterX

tags.documentation: Current part angle.
tags.name: PartAngle

tags.documentation: Joint 3 Y current position, used in Command calculations.
tags.name: J3Y

tags.documentation: Current Y location of the part center.
tags.name: PartCenterY

tags.documentation: Joint 3 X current position, used in Command calculations.
tags.name: J3X

eventScripts.script:
import math
		
	tagPaths= [tagPath.rsplit('/',2)[0]]
	udt = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)[0].value
	
	partAngle = udt.Outputs.PartAngle
	j3X = udt.Outputs.J3X
	j3Y = -udt.Outputs.J3Y
	L1 = udt.Arm1.Inputs.Length
	L2 = udt.Arm2.Inputs.Length
	L3 = udt.Arm3.Inputs.Length
	arm2current = udt.Arm2.Inputs.Angle
	
	def shortestAngle(a, b):
		if a-b>180:
			return a-b-360
		elif a-b<-180:
			return a-b+360
		else:
			return a-b
			
	def getJointAngles(len1, len2, x, y):
		lenXY = (x**2+y**2)**0.5 # length of third imaginary edge at x,y location
		if lenXY==len1+len2:
			angleXY = 180
			angle2 = 0
		else:
			angleXY = math.degrees(math.acos((len1**2+len2**2-lenXY**2)/(2*len1*len2))) # law of cosine, angle opposing lenXY
			angle2 = math.degrees(math.asin(len2/lenXY*math.sin(math.radians(angleXY)))) # law of sine, angle opposing len2
		alpha = math.degrees(math.asin(y/lenXY)) # angloe from x plane
		if shortestAngle(arm2current,0) >=0:
			if x>=0:
				joint1    = 90-alpha-angle2
			else:
				joint1    = -90+alpha-angle2
			joint2 = 180-angleXY
		else:
			if x>=0:
				joint1 = 90-alpha+angle2
			else:
				joint1 = -90+alpha+angle2
			joint2 = -180+angleXY
		return joint1%360, joint2%360
		
	arm1origin, arm2origin = getJointAngles(L1,L2,j3X,j3Y)
	arm3origin = partAngle-arm1origin-arm2origin
	
	newTheta = udt.Inputs.Theta
	newX = udt.Inputs.X - L3 * math.sin(math.radians(newTheta))
	newY = - udt.Inputs.Y - L3 * math.cos(math.radians(newTheta))

	try:
		arm1angle, arm2angle = getJointAngles(L1,L2,newX,newY)
		arm3angle  = newTheta-arm1angle-arm2angle
	except:
		tagPaths = ["[.]../StateMachine/CurrentStep/Status"]
		values = [system.util.jsonEncode({'Faulted':'Move not possible, X: %s Y: %s Theta: %s'%(udt.Inputs.X, udt.Inputs.Y, udt.Inputs.Theta)})]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)
		return
		
	arm1delta = shortestAngle(arm1angle,arm1origin)
	arm2delta = shortestAngle(arm2angle,arm2origin)
	arm3delta = shortestAngle(arm3angle,arm3origin)
	
	tagPaths = [
		 "[.]../Inputs/ExecuteXY"
		,"[.]../Arm1/Inputs/Angle"
		,"[.]../Arm2/Inputs/Angle"
		,"[.]../Arm3/Inputs/Angle"
		,"[.]../StateMachine/CurrentStep/Status"
	]
	
	values = [
		 False
		,udt.Arm1.Inputs.Angle + arm1delta
		,udt.Arm2.Inputs.Angle + arm2delta
		,udt.Arm3.Inputs.Angle + arm3delta
		,system.util.jsonEncode({'Running':'Moving to X: %s Y: %s Theta: %s'%(udt.Inputs.X, udt.Inputs.Y, udt.Inputs.Theta)})
	]
	
	system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, values)

tags.documentation: Combination of X, Y, Theta, ExecuteXY tags to avoid race conditions. This tag's event script calculates and sends appropriate angles to all of the joints within this UDT.
tags.name: Command
